TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Pyahaw ga niya mki sku Girang Keng atu Nango go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 389 buwan, 1,227 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 92% kyan ku 1,133 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 8% kyan ku 94 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 86%, Amis 2%, Truku 1%, Paywan 1%, Bunun 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 2%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkyahu' na Pyahaw hya' ga K'babaw. tay 'llaw na Pyahaw hya' ga Kngungu. tay 'zil na Pyahaw hya' ga Ryohen. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ pjaħaw ɣa nija mki s~ɕku ɣiraŋ keŋ atu naŋo ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *,*** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *,*** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%, amis~ɕ *%, truku *%, pajwan *%, βunun *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. rħzjal kkiʔan taj mkjaħuʔ na pjaħaw ħjaʔ ɣa kʔβaβaw. taj ʔllaw na pjaħaw ħjaʔ ɣa kŋuŋu. taj ʔzil na pjaħaw ħjaʔ ɣa rjoħen. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Pyahaw ga niya mki sku Girang Keng atu Nango go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 389 buwan, 1,227 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 92% kyan ku 1,133 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 8% kyan ku 94 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 86%, Amis 2%, Truku 1%, Paywan 1%, Bunun 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 2%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkyahu' na Pyahaw hya' ga K'babaw. tay 'llaw na Pyahaw hya' ga Kngungu. tay 'zil na Pyahaw hya' ga Ryohen. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ pjaħaw ɣa nija mki s~ɕku ɣiraŋ keŋ atu naŋo ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *,*** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *,*** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%, amis~ɕ *%, truku *%, pajwan *%, βunun *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. rħzjal kkiʔan taj mkjaħuʔ na pjaħaw ħjaʔ ɣa kʔβaβaw. taj ʔllaw na pjaħaw ħjaʔ ɣa kŋuŋu. taj ʔzil na pjaħaw ħjaʔ ɣa rjoħen. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
